ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "external_author_id" INTEGER /* External author ID for the user */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author name or handle */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the user is located */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language used by the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., personal, business) */,
  "account_category" TEXT /* Category of the account (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "new_june_2018" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user is new as of June 2018 */,
  "alt_external_id" INTEGER /* Alternative external ID for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "harvested_date" TEXT /* Date the post was harvested */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., retweet, original post) */,
  "retweet" INTEGER /* Indicator if the post is a retweet */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Tweet ID for the post */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the article associated with the post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* The social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post has received */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares the post has received */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A calculated score representing the overall engagement of the post */,
  "sentiment_analysis" TEXT /* Precomputed sentiment analysis result (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media attached to the post (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media attached to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the post */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A score representing the strength of the engagement */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment, if the engagement type is a comment */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL of the shared post, if the engagement type is a share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tco_steps" (
  "tco_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TCO step */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being tracked */,
  "tco1_step1" TEXT /* First TCO step */,
  "tco2_step1" TEXT /* Second TCO step */,
  "tco3_step1" TEXT /* Third TCO step */,
  "step_count" INTEGER /* Total number of TCO steps */,
  "step_details" TEXT /* Detailed steps in a JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tco_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tco_steps_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was tracked */,
  "topic_volume" INTEGER /* Number of posts or mentions related to the topic */,
  "topic_sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of posts related to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tracking" (
  "topic_tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic tracking */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being tracked */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being tracked */,
  "tracking_date" TEXT /* Date of the topic tracking */,
  "tracking_score" REAL /* A score representing the relevance or importance of the topic to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tracking_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tracking_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_topics" (
  "user_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user topic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "interest_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's interest in the topic */,
  "interest_score" REAL /* A score representing the user's interest in the topic */,
  "last_interested_at" TEXT /* Date the user last showed interest in the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_topics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analyst account was created */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Date the analyst was last active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string representing the analyst's permissions */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst's supervisor (foreign key to `analysts`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
